programmes.show_description: Revenge-fuelled action with Antonio Banderas. After his wife and daughter are murdered, a lawyer takes a vow of silence and uses martial arts training to transform his body and avenge them.
Classic horror starring Vincent Price. A young soldier tries to end the cruel acts of Matthew Hopkins - the self-appointed 'Witchfinder General' - during the English Civil War.
Horror Channel returns soon.

When a frightened 6-year-old claims to have spotted a snake in his home, he and his mother move out and sue for damages.
A young woman moves in with her employer whom she later accuses of vandalizing her car; her employer says she stole from her family.
After meeting in a homeless shelter, ex-roommates fight over alleged vandalism and highly suspicious CPS reports.
Parents of two children fight over alleged vehicle vandalism, bleached clothes and a car crash.
Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases.

While a woman is watching TV, her Husky allegedly escapes the home, enters a neighbour's house and mauls his kitten.

A mass shooting on the University of Alabama campus leaves the country in shock. The investigation leads to a bitter professor who wanted revenge.
Real estate tycoon Gary Triano is dead after his car explodes. His ex-wife, Pamela Phillips, is to blame when police discover her plot to receive his life insurance policy.
Two doctors and a plot to kill - the man who posed as a hired hit man speaks out for the first time to correspondent Peter Van Sant.
A union official is executed in his home not long after a strike by the union membership. Neither his wife nor anyone in the neighbourhood heard any gunshots.
A man tells police he shot an intruder who had attacked and murdered his wife. Four years later, new forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the motives of this 'hero'.

Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern, high-kicking martial arts western. Walker helps free a man falsely accused of a crime, but then things take an ugly turn...
Thriller remake with Robert De Niro. A psychopathic rapist is released from prison after 14 years and plots revenge on the defence attorney he blames for his imprisonment.
Crime drama with Stephen Dorff. A crooked cop trying to redeem himself finds his shady past coming back to haunt him when the man who saved his life needs a favour.
Action thriller with Steven Seagal. A former Russian mobster returns home for his daughter's wedding, but returns to his old way of life when she's assaulted by his arch-enemy.
Nail-biting action with Wesley Snipes. A military unit investigating the disappearance of their predecessors in a high-tech compound find themselves trapped as strange events unfold.

An ongoing feud involving bad credit and an expensive car divides sisters; an unassuming friend comes along for the ride.
A man saves thousands in a lock box to be given to his roommate after he dies; his sister's allegedly covert `opening? of the safe is called into question.
A man says he was trying to stop a car from running him down by pounding on the hood of the oncoming vehicle.
A woman sues her ex-boyfriend's mother for the return of money paid for a car; an alleged assault and child support come into play.

After a woman is sideswiped by a fellow motorist, she is allegedly caught on tape bashing the windows and slashing the tyres of the other car involved.

When Devon Guzman is found with her throat cut, investigators think her girlfriend is to blame, however a jealous love triangle points to the killers.
When a neighbourhood quarrel boils over, Billy Woodward decides to strike first. Billy crawls across the street and opens fire, killing two and injuring one.
A Brooklyn woman turns to a N.Y. private eye for help tracking down a Russian beauty she believes robbed and killed her mother. Can they find her? Peter Van Sant investigates.
The double homicide of a gay couple leads investigators into the twisted world of White Supremacists. Shell casings and analysis of glass shards help authorities find the suspect.
Police discover a man shot dead in his home after they receive a call from his worried mother. The search for the killer would lead them on a two-year investigation spanning several states.

Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Garrett Stone, who Walker helped put away years prior, is paroled and resumes his life of crime.
Spectacular action starring Jamie Foxx and Jessica Biel. When a fighter plane controlled by artificial intelligence goes rogue, three ace pilots must bring it under control.
Sci-fi action thriller with Chris Evans. Two Americans with psychic abilities must find a girl in Hong Kong before a shadowy government organisation does.
